results.title: Oilers 2025-26 Report Cards: Connor McDavid
results.description: As the offseason rolls on, so do the Edmonton Oilers’ player grades. The last report card graded Jake Walman, and now we turn our attention to our final player, captain Connor McDavid.

results.title: From Spain: Roma eyeing Icardi as Malen back-up
results.description: While awaiting the official announcement of Tony D’Amico as their new sporting director, Roma has already identified some of their priorities for the summer transfer window. Among these is the need ...
